author: phase-4-coordinator
content: Decision: Implement ops in ferray-core directly to avoid circular dep with ferray-ufunc. For the initial implementation, require same-shape arrays (no broadcasting) — this keeps it simple and avoids needing the full broadcast machinery in the operator impls. Users who need broadcasting can use ferray::add() etc. from ferray-ufunc. Will implement for &Array + &Array (producing new Array), plus owned variants via delegation. Will add ops module to ferray-core.
